title: Tylopsacas cuneata
taxonomy: Tylopsacas cuneata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Central and South America. The classification of Tylopsacas cuneata is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, and family Rubiaceae. The genus Tylopsacas is also within the family Rubiaceae. The classification of this plant is an important tool for identifying and understanding its unique characteristics.
